mapper.sql: user_id, deposit_recharge, deposit_free, win_recharge, win_free, bonus_pending, bonus_credited, practice_chips, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into info_user_currency
user_id,
deposit_recharge,
deposit_free,
win_recharge,
win_free,
bonus_pending,
bonus_credited,
practice_chips,
update_time,
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{depositRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{depositFree,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{winRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{winFree,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{bonusPending,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{bonusCredited,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{practiceChips,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update info_user_currency
deposit_recharge = #{depositRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deposit_free = #{depositFree,jdbcType=BIGINT},
win_recharge = #{winRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT},
win_free = #{winFree,jdbcType=BIGINT},
bonus_pending = #{bonusPending,jdbcType=BIGINT},
bonus_credited = #{bonusCredited,jdbcType=BIGINT},
practice_chips = #{practiceChips,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update info_user_currency set deposit_recharge = #{depositRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deposit_free = #{depositFree,jdbcType=BIGINT}, win_recharge = #{winRecharge,jdbcType=BIGINT}, win_free = #{winFree,jdbcType=BIGINT}, bonus_pending = #{bonusPending,jdbcType=BIGINT}, bonus_credited = #{bonusCredited,jdbcType=BIGINT}, practice_chips = #{practiceChips,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
